title: Debugging
description: Master debuggers for dynamic game analysis.

topics.title: x64dbg
topics.description: Primary user-mode debugger for Windows games.
topics.explanation:
x64dbg features:
- Intuitive GUI, memory map, symbols
- Conditional breakpoints, logging
- Plugin ecosystem (Scylla, xAnalyzer)
- Separate x32/x64 versions

Workflow: attach → set BP on API/string → run → inspect registers/stack/memory.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for x64dbg
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment
Apply knowledge to a simple open-source game target
Document findings and review prerequisites for advanced topics
exercises: Write a summary explaining x64dbg in your own words
Create a diagram mapping key concepts and relationships
Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: WinDbg
topics.explanation:
WinDbg debugs user and kernel mode:
- `.symfix`, `.reload` for symbols
- `!heap`, `!address` for memory
- Time Travel Debugging (TTD)
- Kernel debugging for driver research

Essential for crash analysis and deep internals.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for WinDbg
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment
Apply knowledge to a simple open-source game target
Document findings and review prerequisites for advanced topics
exercises: Write a summary explaining WinDbg in your own words
Create a diagram mapping key concepts and relationships
Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: Cheat Engine Debugger
topics.explanation:
CE's debugger integrates with memory scanning:
- Break and trace (find what writes/accesses)
- Debugger attach with VEH debugger option
- Auto assembler for patches (research VMs)

Best for correlating memory values with code.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Cheat Engine Debugger
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment
Apply knowledge to a simple open-source game target
Document findings and review prerequisites for advanced topics
exercises: Write a summary explaining Cheat Engine Debugger in your own words
Create a diagram mapping key concepts and relationships
Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: Hardware Breakpoints
topics.explanation:
CPU debug registers break on execute/read/write at addresses. Limited to 4 active breakpoints. Bypass some anti-debug that checks for INT3 (0xCC).

Set in x64dbg: Breakpoint → Hardware, Access.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Hardware Breakpoints
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment

Document findings and review prerequisites for advanced topics
exercises: Write a summary explaining Hardware Breakpoints in your own words
Create a diagram mapping key concepts and relationships
Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: Software Breakpoints
topics.explanation: Debugger replaces instruction byte with 0xCC. Original restored on continue. Detectable by integrity checks. Use hardware BPs when SW BPs are cleared.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Software Breakpoints
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment
Apply knowledge to a simple open-source game target
Document findings and review prerequisites for advanced topics
exercises: Write a summary explaining Software Breakpoints in your own words
Create a diagram mapping key concepts and relationships
Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: Memory Tracing
topics.explanation:
Techniques:
- CE 'Find what writes to this address'
- Hardware watchpoints
- Page guard exceptions
- x64dbg memory breakpoints

Trace back from known value to setter function.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Memory Tracing
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment

Document findings and review prerequisites for advanced topics

Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: Exception Handling
topics.explanation:
Windows uses Structured Exception Handling (SEH linked list) and Vectored Exception Handlers. Debuggers intercept exceptions first.

Anti-debug may use SEH for timing checks. Understand exception flow for analysis.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Exception Handling
